narrative:
Athens Township has 14,570 registered voters, with 60.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 24.0 percentage points.
